event_info: a good shot to start the innings. This was pitched up by the bowler and Samson drives it through covers. The fielder in the deep sprints across and puts in a dive near the boundary; stops the ball and saves one. Stubbs was the fielder on that occasion
tad fuller around off; Ruturaj Gaikwad drives it towards the fielder at covers crisply
good length delivery outside off; Ruturaj Gaikwad punches it towards mid-off and scampers across to the other end

Sanju Samson with his first boundary of the match. This was short and wide outside off; Sanju Samson plays a late-cut; but Stubbs stationed in the deep fails to stop the boundary this time around. Had no chance to stop this one
back of a length around off; Sanju Samson pats it with soft hands towards the keeper. Wants a single; but Gaikwad shows no interest
way too wide outside off; Sanju Samson lets it through to the keeper
back of a length delivery around middle and leg; Sanju Samson clips it towards backward square leg where Natarajan slips while stopping the ball. Ends up giving away an easy single in the process
opens the bat face late; steering this towards backward point for one
fraction short around off; Ruturaj Gaikwad nudges it towards mid-on with soft hands
good length delivery around off; punched to cover by Ruturaj Gaikwad
advances down the wicket; nudging this towards mid-on for one
easy pickings! Drifting on the pads; Sanju Samson flicks it away to the fine leg fence nonchalantly
back-to-back boundaries. This was pitched up by the pacer and Sanju Samson drilled it straight past the non-striker to end the over with four runs
length ball at the stumps; Ruturaj Gaikwad knocks it towards mid-off and takes a quick run
that almost went the distance! Back of a length around off; Sanju Samson stays put and swings it over long-on. This one hits the cushion on the bounce. Looked like a six for a moment
shaping away from the batter outside off; Sanju Samson steers it towards backward point for one
back of a length around middle and leg; Ruturaj Gaikwad clips it towards mid-wicket
Auqib Nabi Dar goes full on off; Ruturaj Gaikwad plays this off the front foot; driving it straight to the fielder at cover
back of a length around middle and leg; Ruturaj Gaikwad clips it through the leg-side for a single
tad short outside off; Ruturaj Gaikwad rocks back in the crease and punches it through covers for a rollicking boundary. Axar Patel greeted into the attack with four runs
advances down the wicket to push-drive this back to the bowler
flatter one around off; Ruturaj Gaikwad pats it towards the off-side for one
chipped over the infield. Makes room and chips this tossed up delivery over covers for a boundary again. He's in good touch tonight
tad short around off; Sanju Samson knocks it into the off-side
third boundary of the over; 13 runs from it. This was pitched up by Axar Patel; Sanju Samson made room and chipped it over the infield at covers to end the over with four more
tad short outside off; shapes back in as Ruturaj Gaikwad slices it towards short third man
good length delivery around middle and leg; Ruturaj Gaikwad clips it through mid-wicket. The fielder chases it and stops it with a slide in the deep. Three runs taken
on a length around off; Sanju Samson taps it towards point and takes a single
short and wide outside off; cut away through point for one

pitched up by the bowler outside off; was in the slot and all Samson had to do; is loft it. Stays put in the crease and beautifully lofts it over mid-off. On the bounce and over the boundary. High elbows and a pose for the cameras
fraction short outside off; skids along the deck; Sanju Samson attempts a late-cut; gets beaten due to the pace and bounce though
50-run stand up in the 6th over! On a length around middle and leg; Ruturaj Gaikwad nudges it towards mid-on for one

even Lungi Ngidi gets the treatment. This was a slower one by Lungi Ngidi outside off; rolled his fingers and went wide outside off; Sanju Samson plays a lovely shot and cuts it away through cover-point for a rollicking boundary
on a length outside off; Sanju Samson punches it towards cover for a single. Didn't that time it well enough as it was the slower one
advances down the wicket; driving this towards cover for one
back of a length delivery outside off; Sanju Samson plays it late; steering it away to the third man fence with the fielder inside the circle
full and wide outside off; Sanju Samson drives it through covers for one. End of a productive powerplay for Chennai - 61/0 after 6
flatter through the air on off; Sanju Samson knocks it down to long-off for one

ball_event: out Caught by Pathum Nissanka!! A rusty knock by the CSK skipper comes to an end. His lean run in IPL 2026 continues. This was fraction short by Axar Patel and Ruturaj Gaikwad wanted to pull it away. Takes the aerial route
event_info: but doesn't time it well enough. Nissanka stationed at deep mid-wicket settles underneath and takes a safe catch to draw curtains to Gaikwad's knock. DC skipper with the breakthrough. Ruturaj Gaikwad c Pathum Nissanka b Axar Patel 15(18) [4s-1]
flatter through the air at the stumps; clipped to mid-on for one
tossed up delivery around off; chipped towards cover by Sanju Samson
driven towards wide long-off for a single
tad fuller at the stumps; Ayush Mhatre chips it right over the bowler for a single
tossed up delivery around middle and leg; clipped to wide long-on by Ayush Mhatre
a lot slower through the air on off; Sanju Samson drives it to extra cover
fraction short around off; slapped to wide long-off for a single
tad short as Ayush Mhatre drags it towards wide long-on for one
dragged through mid-wicket for one as the bowler goes short
short and punished! Ayush Mhatre rocks back in the crease and pulls this through the gap at long-on and deep mid-wicket
Sanju Samson brings up his first fifty for CSK! This was a full length delivery on leg and Sanju Samson flicked it towards fine leg for a single. His partner walks upto him and congratulates him
on a length outside off; punched to cover by Ayush Mhatre for one
drifting on the pads; Ayush Mhatre clips it towards wide long-on for one

Mukesh Kumar goes full and Sanju Samson drills it straight down the ground. A good stop in the deep by the fielder and a better throw at the bowler's end would have had the non-striker in trouble. He was a touch slow while coming back for the second
tad short outside off; Sanju Samson goes for a cut; mistimes it towards backward point

Delhi Capitals have reviewed for a non-wide. The onfield call was a wide; but Mukesh Kumar reckons it wasn't one. They challenge the decision and it has to be reversed. A good review by DC - every run matters

run-out chance missed! KL Rahul makes a mess of it. Ayush Mhatre had driven this towards mid-off and he set off for a single. There was never a run on offer as Ayush Mhatre had to turn back. The throw comes at the keeper's end; but he fails to gather it cleanly. Had he gathered it cleanly and taken off the bails; it would have been curtains for the batter. How costly a miss will that prove to be?
worked through the leg-side by Ayush Mhatre for a single

dropped! Nissanka puts one down. Sanju Samson had lofted this towards long-off and the fielder came charging in to take it. Fails to grab it; and it results in a boundary eventually. The fielding by DC has been pretty sloppy in this over
flatter through the air; Sanju Samson rocks back in the crease and thumps it over the bowler's head for a boundary. This was placed a lot better
played through the off-side by Sanju Samson for one
knocked to long-on by Ayush Mhatre for one
short and wide outside off; Ayush Mhatre throws the kitchen sink at it; carving it through backward point as the ball races away to the fence in a jiffy
good length delivery around off; punched through cover for one
that's a juicy full toss as Sanju Samson flicks it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen. Struck it cleanly and was always going to be a maximum
fraction short outside off; tad slow as Sanju Samson slices it towards short third man. 100 up for CSK in the 11th over
fraction short outside off; Ayush Mhatre slices it over backward point for one
way too short and wide outside off; Sanju Samson lets it through to the keeper
here's a juicy full toss as Sanju Samson drives it straight past the bowler for one
tossed up delivery around middle and leg; Sanju Samson sweeps this through backward square leg for a single
in the air and that has gone the distance! Ayush Mhatre takes the aerial route and launches it towards long-on. Miller in the deep circles underneath it; but this just clears him
dropped! Ayush Mhatre chips this right back to the bowler and Kuldeep Yadav gets his hands to it in his followthrough. The ball bursts through his mitts and that's another chance missed
50-run stand up! Played towards long-on by Sanju Samson for a single
on the batter's pads who nudges this towards long-on for one
slapped over deep extra cover! This was short and wide outside off; Sanju Samson throws his hands at it; slapping it over the boundary for a flat six. Moves to 77 as a result of that maximum
tad short outside off; Ayush Mhatre attempts a cut; gets an inside edge towards the keeper

slower delivery outside off; slight width on offer; Ayush Mhatre throws his hands at this widish delivery; slashes hard and the outside edge flies away to the third man fence. Had there been a slip in place; this would have flown over that fielder

stand and deliver! Pitched up by the bowler around off; tad slower; right into the slot and Ayush Mhatre has powered it over the bowler's head for a towering six. Lungi Ngidi getting punished tonight. His slower one's haven't been that effective
on the fuller side; a full toss in fact; Ayush Mhatre goes for a drive and gets an inside edge as the ball drops next to the pitch
much better from Lungi Ngidi. Back to a quicker length ball outside off; Ayush Mhatre goes for a cut and misses
tad slower around off; Ayush Mhatre drives it towards mid-off and takes a single
flatter through the air on leg; Ayush Mhatre clips it through backward square leg
drifting on the pads; Sanju Samson clips it through mid-wicket for one
knocked along the carpet to long-on
drifting on the pads; Sanju Samson clips it to wide long-on
tossed up delivery by Axar Patel; right into the slot. Ayush Mhatre goes down on his knee and smokes it over long-on for a towering six
slower through the air; Ayush Mhatre clips it towards long-on
in the air and six! 119.9kph; slower ball on a short of length; Ayush Mhatre crouches a bit and swings hard across the line. Sounds good and it sails over the rope. Third IPL fifty for Mhatre
131.4kph; pitched up delivery; driven uppishly to long-off
stand and deliver! 118.9kph; slower ball into the deck. Sanju Samson spots it early. Stands tall and pummels it over deep midwicket with a thumping pull shot
four more! Natarajan tries to bowl the wide yorker. Samson stays back and throws his arms to slice it over point. Speeds away to the fence
fullish outside off; drilled to long-off who takes it on the bounce
in the blockole and around off; jammed towards cover for a single
full on off; driven to long-off
Mukesh nails the yorker outside off; Samson looks to squeeze it through the off-side. Gets it off the toe-end and the ball deflects onto his arm
another yorker length ball; Samson jams it down to long-on and the single brings up the 100 partnership

132.4kph; yorker outside off; jammed to backward point. Ayush Mhatre sets off for a single and gets sent back. Kuldeep has a shy at the stumps and misses. Ayush was probably gone had there been a direct-hit
dropped! 132.1kph; Ayush Mhatre walks down the pitch to loft. Miscues as he gets too close to the pitch of the ball. Miller runs in from long-on and dives forward but fails to hold onto it
136.5kph; leaves it alone as the line is well outside off
135.6kph; full and wide of off; Samson intentionally opens the bat-face to carve it over backward point. A couple of bounces and into the fence. Samson moves to 95 with that boundary
full and angling in; Ayush Mhatre hoicks it to deep midwicket
slower ball; full and outside off; Samson leans across and eases it to deep point
134.1kph; length ball just outside off; heaved down to long-on
pace off; dips on the batter as well. Yorker length outside off and Samson jams it towards point for a single
114.5kph; pace off again; full outside off; Ayush Mhatre can only push-drive it to sweeper cover

113.4kph; KL Rahul appeals for a caught behind; nothing from Ngidi though. Rahul has a chat with Axar; they don't review. Shuffles across to drive and gets beaten on the outside-edge. No nick there confirms UltraEdge
heaved down to long-on
132.1kph; yorker around off; Samson digs it out
132.4kph; very full; driven along the ground to long-off. DC won't mind the singles at this stage
130.3kph; yorker; squirted through midwicket

after three single-digit scores in his first three matches for his new team; Sanju Samson shows his class with a superb hundred! This is his fourth century in IPL. He got a reprieve on 52 and he's made DC pay. Batted at a good tempo throughout the innings. Samson wears a beaming smile as he removes his helmet and raises his bat. The Chepauk crowd is on its feet. Coming to the ball; it was another yorker from Natarajan; Samson shimmied down to flick and the outside edge took it past short third man
wow! That's cheeky from the centurion. Knows that the yorker is coming and reverse-scoops it over short third man
full delivery on leg; Dube swings hard and inside-halves it through backward square leg
slower ball; very full and dipping on the batter; Dube flicks and misses to get hit on the pad
pace off into the deck; Dube jogs down the pitch to heave and misses
111.1kph; slower ball in the blockhole; Dube stays leg-side to squeeze-drive it to the right of long-off for a couple more
in the blockhole; so Dube can't get under it. Backs away to play across the line. Just a single to deep midwicket

it's high and long! Slower ball; full and in the slot at 112.1kph. Samson gets into a good position with a slight shuffle and swings hard to bludgeon it over long-on for a towering six. A wicketless outing for Ngidi who finishes with 4-0-41-0
round the wicket; length ball and punished! Dube doesn't move much. It's in his hitting arc and he swings hard to thump it over long-on for a 90m six. CSK go past 200 with that maximum
over the wicket now. Almost in the blockhole and well outside off; Dube miscues the drive to long-off for just a single
full toss and Mukesh gets away as Samson swings it away to deep midwicket for a single
136.2kph; overpitched outside off. Big backlift from Dube to smack it over the non-striker. Samson ducks under to evade it and the ball bullets away to the fence
134.9kph; low full toss; Dube shapes to swing over long-on. Doesn't middle it and it falls short of Nissanka. Replay shows that he didn't run in as he spotted it late
very full; drilled straight down the ground and Nissanka dives full-length to his right to keep the batters down to two. CSK post 212 on the board
Akeal oversteps first ball. 87kph; on a length and outside off; Nissanka stabs it to cover
Pathum Nissanka gets off the mark with a boundary. It's the inswinger from Akeal and Nissanka uses the bowler's angle to heave it over midwicket for a one-bounce four
arm ball. Nissanka moves leg-side to punch it towards extra cover
90.7kph; hint of spin; Nissanka goes on the back foot to cut and Anshul Kamboj makes a diving stop at point
92.6kph; middle-stump line; clipped to the left of midwicket. Second no-ball in the over from Akeal
94.6kph; short of length; Rahul rocks back to pull and Noor makes a diving stop to his left at square leg. A dot off the free-hit!
90.5kph; arm ball; fullish length and Rahul pushes it to cover off the back foot for a quick single. Sarfaraz Khan scores a direct-hit at the bowler's end but Rahul is in
arm ball around off; cut straight to backward point. Just 8 off the opening over despite a couple of no-balls
back of a length from over the wicket with a slip in place; Rahul opens the bat-face to force it to deep backward point
first six of the innings! Poor line from Khaleel. Short of a length ball just outside leg and Nissanka helps it on its way to send it over fine leg for an 86m six
short of a good length outside off; chopped to cover
133kph; full and outside off. Allows the batter to free his arms and Nissanka effortlessly elevates it over extra cover
full on the pads and Nissanka flicks it away to fine leg for four more. The man in the deep is too square. Replay shows that it's a slower ball. Khaleel has been struggling with his lines
much better from Khaleel! 134kph; bouncer; Nissanka pulls to deep square leg. 16 runs off the over
96.4kph; Nissanka cuts this arm ball towards backward point for a quick single
authoritative hit from Rahul! Fraction short from Akeal; Rahul backs away and moves leg-side to smack it over mid-off for a one-bounce four
93.2kph; classy stroke from Rahul. Shimmies down the track; moves leg-side in the process and then beautifully lofts it over long-off. Superb timing
flatter and on leg; worked into the midwicket pocket
96.3kph; quick arm ball; comes back in sharply to cramp the batter for room. Nissanka hurriedly brings his bat down to keep it out
99kph; darted in on leg and Nissanka flicks it to short fine leg
Anshul Kamboj welcomed with a boundary. Full delivery; the line is too straight and Rahul helps it on its way to fine leg with a flick
good comeback from Kamboj. Pulls his length back and attacks the stumps. Nips in as well to beat Rahul's flick and hits him high on the pad
133.9kph; short of length outside off; Rahul walks across a bit to heave it across the line and inside-halves to long leg
shot! 133.5kph; in-angling short of a good length ball and Nissanka pulls it handsomely over deep midwicket for an 86m six. That came right off the meat of the bat

131.8kph; similar ball; Nissanka tries to replicate the shot he plays off the previous ball. More of a top-edge but gets enough wood to comfortably clear midwicket. The ball has the legs to run away to the fence. Fifty up for DC
134.1kph; in-seamer on the pads; Nissanka nudges it wide of short fine leg off the inner part of the bat
121.4kph; off-cutter; punched to cover
Nissanka walks forward and moves leg-side in the process to pull it towards long-on. Overton sprints to his left from long-on and slides to flick the ball back in to save a couple of runs

excellent effort from Noor in the deep! Shortish ball and Nissanka swivels to pull over backward square leg. Noor runs to his right and times his jump perfectly. He knows that the momentum will take him over the boundary rope and hence flicks the ball into his play to save four runs. The crowd applaud
short ball with no pace to trouble the batter. Pathum Nissanka moves leg-side; waits for the ball and slaps it over extra cover. One bounce and into the fence
nudges this in-angler to backward square leg

ball_event: out Caught by Jamie Overton!! First wicket in this IPL for Khaleel Ahmed! 138.9kph
event_info: hits the deck hard as he bowls it on the shorter side from round the wicket. Rahul pulls and it hits him high on the bat. No timing whatsoever and Overton completes the catch at midwicket. Much-needed breakthrough for CSK. Rahul c Jamie Overton b Khaleel Ahmed 18(10) [4s-2 6s-1]
dropped! Khaleel Ahmed is the culprit. Full and on the pads; Nissanka flicks it to short fine leg. Goes quickly to him and he puts it down. That was a pretty straightforward chance

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Anshul Kamboj has his man. 139.5kph
event_info: full delivery angling into the right-hander; Nissanka drives sans any feet movement and chips it straight to mid-on. Brevis doesn't err and Khaleel will be relieved. DC lose both their openers within a span of three deliveries. Pathum Nissanka c Dewald Brevis b Anshul Kamboj 41(24) [4s-5 6s-2]
over the wicket; length ball around off and Axar Patel steers it to third man
Sameer Rizvi gets off the mark with a gorgeous cover drive. Full delivery at 136.3kph and Rizvi creams it through the covers. Completes the shot and poses for the photographs
pitched up delivery; Rizvi drives straight to mid-on

129.7kph; Rizvi tries to late-dab this length ball outside off to third man and ends up getting an under-edge that goes to the keeper on the bounce. Could have easily chopped it onto his stumps on another day. Good over for CSK to end the powerplay

ball_event: out Caught by Sarfaraz Khan!! First-ball wicket in the IPL for Gurjapneet Singh. And what a catch too. Look at Sarfaraz at backward point. He is running away to his right
event_info: cap off in his left hand and DC now are in trouble. It's a short of length delivery outside off; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and cuts really hard; doesn't keep it down. Sarfaraz went to his right; with both hands and on the dive takes it superbly. Since it was hit so hard and the ball was travelling; wasn't an easy catch. Sarfaraz has already fielded well tonight and he caps it off with this catch. Another failure for Axar this season. Replays show that Sarfaraz was airborne when he took that. Axar Patel c Sarfaraz Khan b Gurjapneet Singh 1(2)
that's way too high and short. Dug in halfway and it clears the leap of Sanju Samson. 5 bonus runs
short of length and nips back in to off; David Miller goes on the back foot and taps it well wide of backward point for one
short of length and rising on middle; Sameer Rizvi is slightly squared up; the thick leading-edge rolls to the right of backward point. Was in the air for a while
again hits the bat hard. Forces David Miller on to the back foot; this short of length delivery rears up and hits the glove; but luckily for Miller it doesn't go up
short of length outside off; David Miller goes on the back foot and forces it to cover; straight to the fielder
back of a length and tight on middle; David Miller gets right behind the line to defend it to the right of Gurjapneet Singh
that is a serious delivery. Short and had Sameer Rizvi ducking for cover. Sanju Samson can't gather cleanly. It flew off the pitch
short of length and tight on off; Sameer Rizvi goes on the back foot to defend to backward point; opened the face there
back of a length outside off; Sameer Rizvi opens the face of the bat and guides it fine to third man
short of length and tight on middle; hint of nip-back too; David Miller is rushed; the thick inside-edge hits the back pad and rolls in front of cover
short of length outside off; off-pace; Sameer Rizvi goes on the back foot and punches stylishly to backward point; but straight to the fielder

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Straight to deep square-leg. This ploy of hitting the deck hard is working for CSK. Cross-seam and into the deck outside off
event_info: Sameer Rizvi looks to help the pull but doesn't time it and picks out Brevis. Jamie Overton with a double fist-pump and then the Brett Lee chainsaw too comes out. He is pumped. CSK are on top now. Sameer Rizvi c Dewald Brevis b Jamie Overton 6(9) [4s-1]
flat and good length on middle and leg; David Miller goes on the back foot and tucks to deep mid-wicket
flat good length on off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it wide of cover
a slip in for David Miller. It's tossed up full on off and middle; Miller gets forward to drive to long-on
flat and good length just outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and cuts hard and straight to sweeper cover
flat good length outside off; David Miller goes on the back foot and punches it wide of backward point
tossed up full on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to flick and it goes to deep mid-wicket
short of length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches with an open-face; backward point who is Sarfaraz dives to his left and cuts it offq
full on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive and beats cover to his right

a fumble from Sarfaraz and had he hit direct; it would've been tight. Just in as Tristan Stubbs dives full-length and makes it. A slower-ball on off; David Miller gets forward and pats to backward point and Sarfaraz fails to field properly. After the fumble; the batters decide to run

a direct-hit from Akeal and David Miller was gone. This is a short of length delivery on off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches to the left of Akeal at cover; Miller sets off and is sent back; Akeal had time and he aims and misses at the bowler's end. Miller has a wry smile at the end of it; has a chat with Stubbs
Tristan Stubbs picks the slower-ball on a fuller length outside off and goes through with the loft. It's full and he gets forward and lofts well; flies over long-off
back to seam-up and full on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to push; off the thick outer half of the bat and wide of backward point; rolls away
tossed up; slower and full on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive it hard and straight back to the bowler
tossed up full on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive it hard and straight to extra-cover
flat good length on leg and middle; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and tucks it through vacant mid-wicket
fired down leg; David Miller lets it go and Sanju Samson fumbles; two wides
very full on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive it wide of long-off for one
dragged down on off and David Miller doesn't miss. He goes on the back foot and smashes the pull way back over deep mid-wicket. Picked the length so quickly
fired full and wide down leg; David Miller flicks and misses; again Sanju Samson doesn't take it cleanly

slower and fuller outside off; in the slot and even though David Miller didn't get all of it; he gets forward and lofts straight down the ground. Beats the long-off and long-on fielders. That's the over DC wanted
way too short and well over the head as Tristan Stubbs lets it go and takes the wide
short of length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it to sweeper cover
short of length on off; David Miller goes on the back foot and pushes it wide of cover
short of length on middle; off-pace; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and nudges it between deep mid-wicket and long-on; easy two
in the slot and six. A slower-ball off-cutter and full just outside off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and lofts; easily clears the long-off fielder
slower-ball off-cutter and short of length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it wide of sweeper cover for two
slower-ball off-cutter and short outside off; Tristan Stubbs reaches for it and cuts wide of sweeper cover again; easy two
slower-ball and short of length outside off; David Miller goes on the back foot and cuts; mistimes it to mid-off

ball_event: out Bowled!! That has totally beaten David Miller for pace. He has missed a length delivery. It's pacy and at middle and leg
event_info: cross-seam; Miller is standing outside the leg-stump; tries to adjust and push; but by then the ball is past him. Falls on top of the leg-stump. The bail comes off and that's a massive wicket. David Miller b Jamie Overton 17(14) [4s-1 6s-1]
in the air and the top-edge doesn't carry to fine-leg. It's short at Ashutosh Sharma who flaps the pull; luckily for him the top-edge doesn't carry
short of length on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and pushes it down to long-on

what swag from Ashutosh Sharma. Length delivery and down leg; he flicks and he clears the fielder at fine-leg. Khaleel was back-tracking but the flick had enough. Just bent his body a little and put it away
short of length outside off; Ashutosh Sharma goes on the back foot and opens the face of the bat to glide it down to third man; who is pretty fine
short of length and tight on middle; Ashutosh Sharma gets forward and drops it wide of backward point for an easy single
short of length on off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it to the left of sweeper cover; Noor gets across and cuts it off but they take two

thick outside-edge and it beats Khaleel to his left at short third man. On a short of length and angling away from the right-hander; Tristan Stubbs cuts and the ball just about drops on him at the last moment. A better effort could've seen him take the catch. Instead it runs away for four
short of length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and cuts hard and square of the wicket on the off-side
short of length and tight on middle; Ashutosh Sharma is hurried but he manages to keep it out
full and outside off; Ashutosh Sharma shuffles across and tries to heave and misses. Two dots in a row
flat back of a length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and cuts hard and straight to sweeper cover
tossed up full on middle; Ashutosh Sharma gets forward and lofts so well; Overton runs across and dives to his right at long-off; but the ball wins; so much power

CSK lose the review. A clear spike when the ball is next to glove. Ashutosh Sharma looks to reverse-sweep this one which has pitched outside the leg-stump I think. But anyway that doesn't matter as UltraEdge throws up a spike

the power of Ashutosh Sharma. He backs away and slams the loft; it's tossed up full on middle; in the slot and Ashutosh doesn't miss. Sanju Samson has a wry smile on his face as the ball flies over long-off

ball_event: out Caught by Anshul Kamboj!! That's good bowling. It's cleverly tossed up full and wide outside off
event_info: asks Ashutosh Sharma to go for it; he obliges; gets forward to loft; the face opens and AK from sweeper cover runs in and takes a good catch. First wicket taken by a CSK spinner this season. Ashutosh was looking dangerous but he falls to leave DC in further soup. Timeout taken. Ashutosh Sharma c Anshul Kamboj b Noor Ahmad 19(10) [4s-1 6s-2]

first-ball for Auqib Nabi Dar in the IPL and he has belted it for four. It's the tossed up full googly; Auqib Nabi gets forward and drives it well; no chance for sweeper cover to his right. Told you - this Auqib Nabi can bat
slower-ball and just inside the tramline on the off-side; good length; Tristan Stubbs reaches for it to cut and misses; not called a wide
short of length and tight outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and taps it to backward point
short of length and just outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Akeal Hosein!! Fine catch at extra-cover. Auqib Nabi Dar went for it
event_info: and holes out. Full on leg-stump; Auqib Nabi backs away and tries to slog to leg; the ball flies high off the thick outer half; Akeal tracks it but misjudges - that's why he has to stretch his hands backwards and haul it in behind him. He falls to turf and lands badly. A grimace on his face forms even as Gaikwad smiles; unable to believe that it has been taken. Akeal almost made a meal of it. Auqib Nabi c Akeal Hosein b Jamie Overton 4(2) [4s-1]
short of length on middle; Kuldeep Yadav goes on the back foot and opens the face of the bat to run it down to third man
good length outside off; off-pace; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and turns it to the deep square-leg region
short of length on middle; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket
short of length outside off; Kuldeep Yadav goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket. AK fumbles but they are happy with one
Tristan Stubbs is now going to take his chances. It's a slower-ball and well wide outside off; he reaches for it and cuts it well wide of backward point. Was the width and put away
he has smashed this. A short of length delivery and seam-up on off; Tristan Stubbs hangs back and pulls; gets enough elevation to clear Brevis at deep mid-wicket. 10 off the last 2 balls
full on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive; two two is the call; Kuldeep Yadav rushes back to make it. 50 for Stubbs
low full-toss on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to drive to long-off
that round the wicket angle again. Full and right up there outside off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive to extra-cover; straight to the fielder and Stubbs doesn't want the run
yorker length outside off; Tristan Stubbs tries to reverse-sweep and doesn't time it; finds deep backward point. And he doesn't take the run

Noor has made a meal of it. Doesn't account for the spin at sweeper cover and he has been left high and dry. Full and wide outside off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and lofts over extra-cover. Noor goes to his right; the ball spins away to his left. Two turns to four
low full-toss on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive to mid-on. Takes the run
full on middle from round the wicket; Kuldeep Yadav gets low and reverse-laps; the top-edge flies fine and Khaleel does the fielding at third man
that has been belted by Tristan Stubbs. It's a low full-toss outside off; Stubbs gets forward and smashes the drive; long-off is wide and he can't get across and cut it off. Gaikwad the man

1 run; it's a slower-ball and across Kuldeep Yadav; full and just outside off; he shuffles across and misses the flick; impact outside off and Jamie Overton gets across and under-arms the flick; interesting with a direct-hit as Tristan Stubbs was stretching to make it

short and wide down leg; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot to hook and misses; Sanju Samson appeals for a caught behind; then checks with Jamie Overton who says he is not sure. It flies over the top-edge and the glove; was close to both of them

that's a good review by CSK. Given as a wide. Gaikwad reviews and the ball is inside the tramline. A wide slower-ball and outside off; Tristan Stubbs tries to drive and misses; under the bat and Gaikwad reviews sucessfully

ball_event: out Caught by Noor Ahmad!! Tristan Stubbs has flung the helmet after opening the dressing room door. He is ticking. He is clearly not happy. Also Nitish Rana
event_info: Badani and Karun Nair were having a chat with the fourth ump. They are not happy too. Doull on air says that Stubbs was denied a glove-change at the end of the last over. In between overs you can says Doull. It's full and just outside off; Stubbs gets forward to loft; the bat turns and that's why no elevation; Noor tracks back at mid-off and takes it. A bit of a bobble but he hangs on. That is the defining wicket one feels. Was the cross-seamer which has produced Jamie Overton another wicket; who is pumped too. As he walks back; Stubbs has a go at the ump. Then drops the bat near the steps and then the helmet takes a beating. Tristan Stubbs c Noor Ahmad b Jamie Overton 60(38) [4s-4 6s-3]
short of length on middle; an airy flick but mid-wicket is not there
slower-ball and full outside off; Kuldeep Yadav shuffles across and clips it back to Jamie Overton. He loses his balance as well and slips after playing the shot
short of length on middle; Kuldeep Yadav goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket; retains the strike with that run

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Simple catch for Brevis at extra-cover. He goes back and takes it. It's full and following Kuldeep Yadav outside the leg-stump
event_info: he comes down the track to loft and miscues it totally. Kuldeep Yadav c Dewald Brevis b Anshul Kamboj 4(7)
short of length outside off; Natarajan has no feet; pushes at it; past the outside-edge
full on middle; Natarajan gets forward and pushes it down to long-on
full and across Lungi Ngidi outside off; he tries to carve it and misses. It's a front foot no-ball
full and across Lungi Ngidi outside off; he again makes room to loft over cover; misses
low full-toss outside off; Lungi Ngidi backs away and carves it over extra-cover; long-off gets across and cuts it off to his left

ball_event: out Caught by Gurjapneet Singh!! CSK win finally this season. They break their duck and register their first points. It's a wide and full delivery outside off
event_info: Lungi Ngidi does well to reach for it; was a wide had he left that; but the toe-end is found and the ball flies straight to the fielder at short third man. Gurjapneet makes no mistake. Lungi Ngidi c Gurjapneet Singh b Anshul Kamboj 3(5)
